title: MiCA-licensed Banking Circle joins bank stablecoin settlement race in Europe
message_html: MiCA-licensed Banking Circle joins bank stablecoin settlement race in Europe ...
snippet: Banking Circle's stablecoin settlement launch follows its CASP approval, entering a crowded market with SocGen, Sygnum and a 12-bank euro stablecoin consortium.

title: Kbank teams with Ripple on overseas blockchain remittance trial
message_html: Kbank teams with Ripple on overseas blockchain remittance trial ...
snippet: Kbank partnered with Ripple to test blockchain-based overseas remittances as South Korean companies prepare for new stablecoin and digital asset rules.
